Check the Shortage Data Query to confirm evidence/reply mails were sent to both partners; if not, requeue to both / the respective hubs.

Else → reply with the rejection template.

disposition: QC failure

preconditions: Loss is marked even after I have shared QC images

checks.description: Step 1: Identify the loss marked AWB* When the Captain raises a request stating that the FE has been marked with a wrong loss, the agent needs to first enter the **FE ID or Phone Number** in query:https://metabase-main.bi.meeshogcp.in/question/187207-qc-fail* Apply the **exact time range** when the loss was marked.* The Captain will share the **loss marked amount**.* The agent needs to locate the same amount on the mentioned date and identify the **AWB number** against which the loss was marked.

Step 2: Check the debit reason* Enter the identified **AWB number** in query:https://metabase-main.bi.meeshogcp.in/question/187207-qc-fail* Check the **debit_reason** column.* The possible debit reasons are:* LM Secondary QC junk image* Pickup junk image* ICUD junk image* Pickup vs QC image mismatch.

Step 3: Identify the node where loss was marked* If the debit reason is **LM Secondary QC junk image** → Loss is marked on the **LM Hub**.* If the debit reason is **Pickup junk image** → Loss is marked on the **LM FE (Pickup FE)**.* If the debit reason is **ICUD junk image** → Loss is marked on the **LM FE (ICUD FE - Forward leg)**.* If the debit reason is **Pickup vs QC image mismatch** → Loss is marked on the **LM FE**.

Step 4: Validate images and take action* The agent needs to review the images captured at the respective node where the loss was marked.* Check whether the entity has followed the required SOP.* If the entity has followed the SOP → The marked loss will be reversed.* If the entity has not followed the SOP → The loss will be considered valid and the entity will bear the loss.

resolution.action: Direct L2 escaltion if a image mismatch is ientified by L1 agent

params.l2_sop:
1. L2 agent must review the ticket and the loss marked.
2. If the loss is correctly marked then response to captain
3. If the loss is rightly contested then L2 agent must raise it for reversal on the dashboard made by the SX team.
4. SX team is to check the loss and confirm the re-attribution within 48 hours.
params.escalation_criteria: Direct L2 escaltion if a image mismatch is ientified by L1 agent

escalation.handover:
L2: 1. L2 agent must review the ticket and the loss marked.
2. If the loss is correctly marked then response to captain
3. If the loss is rightly contested then L2 agent must raise it for reversal on the dashboard made by the SX team.
4. SX team is to check the loss and confirm the re-attribution within 48 hours.

Date*, 
Bank Statement.

preconditions: COD pendency reflecting in system (4.4.1)

checks.description: Check the Cash Handover query.
If no amount shown, validate with the Cluster Head; reply with the template.

resolution.action: If no amount shown, validate with the Cluster Head; reply with the template.

disposition: COD/Negative Payout hardstop marked even after clearing COD pendency & losses. Inputs: Deposit Slip*, Transaction ID*, Date*

preconditions: COD pendency reflecting in system (4.4.1)

checks.description: Check the hardstop tracker.
If in hardstop, share the LOSS form + COD form for the Captain to fill after clearing pendencies.
Escalate to L2.

resolution.action: Escalate to L2 after forms filled.

params.l2_sop: Escalate to Gopal Chandra Jha (picks cases every alternate day).
params.escalation_criteria: Escalate to L2 after forms filled.

escalation.handover: L2: Escalate to Gopal Chandra Jha (picks cases every alternate day).

disposition: CMS partner does not come to collect the COD amount. Inputs: Hub code*

preconditions: CMS is not aligned (4.4.2)

checks.description: Escalate the ticket directly to Riyaz.

resolution.action: Direct escalation to Riyaz.

disposition: Captain unable to see Cash Pendency Tab in panel. Inputs: Hub code

preconditions: Cash Pendency Tab not visible (5)

checks.description: Verify the hub code against the Cost-Ops list.
If present → inform tab unavailable and share the VAN account PDF (template).
If not present → ask the Captain to fill the Google Form to create a VAN account; team reviews, creates VAN account, shares details (template).

resolution.action: If not present → ask the Captain to fill the Google Form to create a VAN account; team reviews, creates VAN account, shares details (template).

disposition: S1: How to place an order

preconditions: Has not received / cannot order consumables

checks.description: Reply with the ordering-process template (account must be whitelisted; details shared with vendors; wait 12–24h; portal link; try other vendors on error).

resolution.action: Reply with the ordering-process template (account must be whitelisted; details shared with vendors; wait 12–24h; portal link; try other vendors on error).

disposition: S2: Unable to order – not whitelisted. Inputs: Partner name, mobile, email, Hub ID

preconditions: Has not received / cannot order consumables

checks.description: If details missing, request via template.
Upload details to the whitelisting sheet; reply completion (template).

resolution.action: Upload details to the whitelisting sheet; reply completion (template).

disposition: S3: Track order / not received / status. Inputs: Order ID, Hub ID

preconditions: Has not received / cannot order consumables

checks.description: Look up the Order ID in RVP Order Details; check Supplier Code, Dispatch/Delivery Date, Order Status, Docket No, Courier.
Delivered → loop in Supplier (L3).
Delivered but not received (fake delivery) → loop in Supplier (L3).
Dispatched → track on the courier site with the docket no; reply with status + how to self-track (template).

resolution.action: Direct L3 escalation (loop in Supplier) for delivered / fake-delivery.

params.escalation_criteria: Direct L3 escalation (loop in Supplier) for delivered / fake-delivery.

disposition: S4: Received fewer consumables than ordered. Inputs: Order ID, consumables ordered, video proof of unpacking

preconditions: Has not received / cannot order consumables

checks.description: Look up the Order ID in RVP Consumables Partner Details; check Order details, qty, status (amount = order details × qty).
Qty matches + delivered → template + loop Supplier (L3).
Qty matches + dispatched → template.
Qty not matching → loop Supplier (L3).

resolution.action: Direct L3 escalation (loop in Supplier).

disposition: S1: Damaged consumables received (video evidence)

preconditions: Secondary QC mismatch (damaged / format mismatch / tampered). Inputs: Order ID, Hub ID

checks.description: Reply acknowledging the inconvenience and loop in Supplier (Direct L3 escalation) — template.

resolution.action: Direct L3 escalation (Supplier).

disposition: S2: Secondary QC failure (code format mismatch)

preconditions: Secondary QC mismatch (damaged / format mismatch / tampered). Inputs: Order ID, Hub ID

checks.description: Evidence = photo of consumable packets showing the code (error flows to all consumables).
Loop in Suppliers (Direct L3 escalation); reply with template.

resolution.action: Direct L3 escalation (Supplier).

disposition: S1: Payment received for X of Y consumables (X<Y) – fraud-prone

preconditions: RVP consumables invoice/payment not received (till April). Inputs: Hub ID, Order ID, Billing cycle, CN/DN, Invoice number

checks.description: Enter the Hub ID in the Captain Payout query; check rvp_consumable_amount, rvp_consumable_packet_count, rvp_consumable_rate (rate × count = amount).
Column count < claimed count → escalate to L3.
Count matches → reply template.
Post-L3 validation routes to Cost-Ops.

resolution.action: Escalate to L3 if counts mismatch; then Cost-Ops.

params.escalation_criteria: Escalate to L3 if counts mismatch; then Cost-Ops.

disposition: S2: Payment not received for any ordered consumables

preconditions: RVP consumables invoice/payment not received (till April). Inputs: Hub ID, Order ID, Billing cycle, CN/DN, Invoice number

checks.description: Enter the Hub ID in the Captain Payout query; check rvp_consumable_* columns.
If count ≈ 0 for the cycles → classify as arrear; payment 2 weeks after the order cycle.
Reply with the template.

resolution.action: Reply with the template.

disposition:
Unable to scan,
Unable to close DRS/BTS,
Unable to mark shipment as delivered,
Unable to click/upload pictures,
App is hanging or freezing,
Login issues,
Any other Log10

preconditions: Tech issues

checks.description: Whenever a captain raises a technical issue, the agent must first verify the exact nature of the problem and confirm whether it is related to Log10.
If the issue is related to Log10, the agent should route the case to the Log10 Team using the template provided below:
"Dear Partner, this is a technical issue. Please raise a ticket with the Ops Tech team by emailing log10-tech-support@valmo.in.and include relevant supporting proof for assistance.
For any other support,Please  feel free to reach out to us.

resolution.action: For any other support,Please  feel free to reach out to us.
